name: Cajun Seasoning
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Transfer the mixture to an airtight container.
3. Store the container in a dark, cool, dry place for up to six months.
4. Avoid storing seasonings on open racks above or near cook tops or ovens, as heat can weaken spice flavors.
5. For long-term storage, consider placing seldom-used seasoning containers in the freezer to maintain freshness.
